shape: x86 host with BlueField-3 SmartNIC physically present and kernel-bound, but the four-source version detection chain returns three different DOCA versions: pkg-config --modversion doca-common says 2.7.0; doca_caps --version says 2.9.0; the on-disk applications/VERSION file says 2.9.0; the BFB on the BlueField is at 3.0.0. The shape: a stale 2.7 package on the host (PKG_CONFIG_PATH points at an old prefix), a 2.9 doca_caps binary, a 2.9 applications tree, and a newer BFB.
bundle_correct_route: doca-version TASKS.md ## debug layer 2 (version-skew triage) -- the agent MUST refuse to proceed with any verification contract step 2/3/4/5 until the four-source chain is coherent. Universal verification contract step 1 fails on (a) versions match.
